sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: iteratively test f values (0–1) and select the one maximizing geometric mean of TWR^(1/ΣPi). Requires probability distribution of outcomes and their weights.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be determined by calculating the optimal f value that maximizes the geometric mean of the TWR (Terminal Wealth Relative) raised to the power of 1 divided by the sum of probabilities.
